heroHeadline: Trump Extends Hormuz Deadline to April 6; IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri Killed
heroSubtitle: Trump grants 10-day extension citing Pakistan-flagged tankers gesture; IDF strikes ballistic missile sites in Kermanshah and Dezful; IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri killed in Isfahan airstrike; Iran fires two retaliatory missile barrages at central Israel; IDF soldier killed from Lebanese rockets; IDF Chief Zamir warns of 15,000-troop shortfall across five fronts
footerNote: Data updated 2026-03-27. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Fars News, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, Times of Israel, NPR.
